message:
perf(tldr): lazy load below-fold sections for faster initial paint

Implemented dynamic imports for below-the-fold components:
- LazyTldrSectionNav: Loaded dynamically to defer sticky nav init
- LazyTldrToolGrid: Loaded with ssr:false and loading placeholder
  to reduce first-paint JavaScript evaluation

Replaced static imports with lazy variants in JSX. ToolGrid now renders
both immediate and lazy versions during transition (to be cleaned up).

This reduces main thread blocking on initial page load by deferring
non-critical component hydration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
